recommendations.title: The Beekeeper
recommendations.overview: One man's campaign for vengeance takes on national stakes after he is revealed to be a former operative of a powerful and clandestine organization known as Beekeepers.

recommendations.title: End of Watch
recommendations.overview: Two young officers are marked for death after confiscating a small cache of money and firearms from the members of a notorious cartel during a routine traffic stop.

recommendations.title: Bright
recommendations.overview: In an alternate present-day where magical creatures live among us, two L.A. cops become embroiled in a prophesied turf battle.

recommendations.title: Street Kings
recommendations.overview: Tom Ludlow is a disillusioned L.A. Police Officer, rarely playing by the rules and haunted by the death of his wife. When evidence implicates him in the execution of a fellow officer, he is forced to go up against the cop culture he's been a part of

recommendations.title: A Working Man

recommendations.title: The Tank

recommendations.title: Lebanon
recommendations.overview: During the First Lebanon War in 1982, a lone tank and a paratroopers platoon are dispatched to search a hostile town.
